classifications.rationale: This is the codified validation execution VM on the governed rollout path and it already has a green headless validation gate.
It is a second running broker-facing runtime path on default network with its own startup bootstrap, static IP, runtime secret, and container repo outside the codified execution rollout.
This service account exists only to support the unmanaged multi-ticker VM path and should not be treated as a sanctioned runtime identity until formally adopted.
This secret feeds the unmanaged VM runtime path and should not be reused or expanded until the owning architecture decision is made.
This runtime bucket is outside the codified role-separated foundation. It is currently empty, which makes it a good candidate for explicit keep-or-delete review.
This repository contains the unmanaged multi-ticker runtime image stream and is not yet governed by the codified execution pipeline.
Default VPC remains broad and currently hosts the unmanaged runtime VM. Institutional promotion requires runtime migration onto vpc-codex-core or explicit decommission.
Project-level Owner remains on service accounts, which is acceptable for bootstrap but not for steady-state runtime or operator posture.
This bucket is useful as a bootstrap transfer archive, but it is not part of the long-term governed runtime storage model and should later be lifecycle-managed or retired.
This is a Cloud Build source bucket pattern rather than part of the runtime foundation. Keep it only if Cloud Build becomes part of the sanctioned deployment plane.

promotion_blockers: A second unmanaged runtime path exists in GCP and has not yet been classified.
Project-level Owner is still granted to service accounts.
Default network is still active and still hosting runtime compute.
There is no cloud-backed shared execution lease yet.
immediate_operator_rules: Do not create any new runner VM, service account, secret, bucket, or artifact repository until the drift classification is accepted.
Do not start broker-facing execution from multi-ticker-trader-v1.
Do not promote vm-execution-paper-01 to canonical execution until Phase 0 and Phase 1 are complete and a trusted validation session is clean.
Treat the codified execution path as the only sanctioned path under active development.
required_decisions: Keep or decommission the multi-ticker-vm identity and multi-ticker-vm-env secret.
Formalize or retire codexalpaca-containers and codexalpaca_cloudbuild.
Define when default VPC can be considered empty enough to quarantine.
